title: OpenCode Schema Registry Index
description: Index of all JSON schemas in the OpenCode/Tribunus project.

governance.description: Each schema is owned by the domain team responsible for its semantics. The owner field on each schema entry identifies the owning domain. Control-plane schemas are owned by the control-plane team. Provider/routing schemas by the LLM team. UI schemas by the app team.

namespace_conventions.rig.relay: Control-plane relay schemas — campaigns, missions, reviews, approvals, push records
namespace_conventions.opencode: Core runtime schemas — debug packets, runtime events
namespace_conventions.theme: UI/design schemas — desktop theme, design tokens

modification_rules.proposal: Schema changes proposed via PR with linked ADR or mission
modification_rules.approval: Owner domain reviews and approves. Cross-domain changes require all affected owners.
modification_rules.merge: CI must pass schema:validate and schema:check before merge
modification_rules.deprecation: Deprecated schemas marked with deprecated:true and tombstone_date. Old versions remain readable for 2 release cycles.
modification_rules.breaking_changes: Breaking changes require new schema version (e.g., v1→v2) and migration path for consumers.

governance.orphan_policy: Schemas without an explicit owner default to control-plane. An automated CI check detects schemas with no owner and fails the build.

schemas.description: List of registered schemas in the project.

schemas.title: Review Manifest
schemas.description: Schema for review manifests that capture the subject, artifacts, weight rubric, comparison data, and verdict of a review cycle.

schemas.title: Verification Record
schemas.description: Schema for verification records capturing verification results and metadata.

schemas.title: Red Team Approval
schemas.description: Schema for red team approval records.

schemas.title: Repair Plan Approval
schemas.description: Schema for repair plan approval records.

schemas.title: Reporting Honesty Audit
schemas.description: Schema for reporting honesty audit records.

schemas.title: Native Tool Architecture Design
schemas.description: Schema for native tool architecture design documents.

schemas.title: Prepublication Review Cycle
schemas.description: Schema for prepublication review cycle records.

schemas.title: Push Record
schemas.description: Schema for push records capturing push events and metadata.

schemas.title: Tribunus Debug Packet
schemas.description: Schema for a full session debug packet exported from Tribunus.

schemas.title: Tribunus Runtime Event
schemas.description: Schema for runtime events capturing session state and transitions.

schemas.title: Database Security Doctrine
schemas.description: Schema for database security doctrine records.

schemas.title: Migration Caller Inventory
schemas.description: Schema for migration caller inventory records.

schemas.title: OpenCode Desktop Theme
schemas.description: A theme definition for the OpenCode desktop application.

schemas.title: Relational Roadmap
schemas.description: Relational roadmap schema mapping ADRs to campaigns, missions, lanes, and tasks with concurrent lane execution.

schemas.title: Relational Roadmap v2
schemas.description: Relational roadmap schema v2 with maturity classification, horizon partitioning, authority scoping, evidence requirements, and unattended execution policies.
